title: croton lasianthus
intro: Croton lasianthus is a type of medicinal plant, also known as 'Red Croton' or 'Rudraksha', that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family and is native to India, Sri Lanka, and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments, as well as being dried and used in powder form for various medicinal purposes.
